title: Russian Grain Shipments to TOP Destinations
section_path: Russian Grain Shipments to TOP Destinations
section_path_text: Russian Grain Shipments to TOP Destinations
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 30.2024 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions July 25, 2024
This week's chart highlights the notable increase in the monthly volume of Russian grain shipments during the first two quarters of this year. By the end of the second quarter, shipments had risen by 15% compared to the previous quarter. Notably, Egypt emerged as the leading destination for Russian grain, accounting for 20% of the total shipments this year.
